Intel also gained desktop CPU share, and aftermarket retail GPU prices increased. Intel aims for 60% gross margin and 40% operating margin, while Foundry targets 40% gross margin and 30% operating margin long-term, with near-term operating margin at -37%. Focus is on product roadmap execution and margin improvement in Foundry business.
